description:
Spec: After the cutover, all uniform-path machinery is dead code.

Work:
- Delete from src/ir_codegen.rs: any `compile_uniform_path`, frame_ptr threading, host_ctx threading no longer referenced.
- Delete from runtime/src/runtime.rs: `run_quantum`, trampoline dispatch loop, `next_frame` field.
- Delete from runtime/src/process.rs: `next_frame`, `frame_sizes` if no remaining consumer.
- Delete from runtime/src/ir_runtime.rs: any FFI helpers only used by trampoline (fz_alloc_frame may stay if still used by something else; check).
- Delete any per-fn-shape sig-construction code that handles a non-Tail CC.
- Audit imports / dead-code warnings.

Acceptance:
- `cargo build --workspace` clean, zero warnings.
- Full test suite still green.
- `git grep "run_quantum\|next_frame\|compile_uniform_path"` returns nothing.
title: fz-cps.1.13: delete dead uniform-path machinery
